Announcements

Announcement: January 12, 2026

Announcement

Dear Students,

In line with the official announcement made by the Istanbul Governer’s Office of the Rebuplic of Türkiye, all face-to-face education and training activities have been suspended for one (1) day on Monday, 12 January 2026, due to adverse weather conditions expected to affect the province.

The postponed final examinations will be held on Saturday, 17 January 2026, at the previously announced times and in the previously designated classrooms.

DİĞER DUYURULAR
